description: To succeed and thrive; flourishing that spreads abundance. 'Welo' names the thriving state—when conditions support full expression of potential.
sound_symbolism: The word flourishes warmly. 'We' flows with generous thriving, prosperity spreading. 'Lo' opens with abundant expression, flourishing manifest.
grammatical_notes: Functions as verb: 'mi welo' (I prosper). The outcome of 'sunoe' (regenerate) and 'pelu' (growth). Related to 'towe' (well) as active thriving to good state.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Shared prosperity—flourishing that includes all, not wealth hoarded by few.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: True prosperity—thriving measured in wellbeing, not accumulation.
